one_time_description: Forgiveness of debt recognized as other income
economic_notes: Lake Babine Nation holds investments in 13 government business enterprises including Burns Lake Native Development Corporation, Lake Babine Economic Development Society, Woyenne Enterprises Ltd., Talok Fisheries Ltd., Talok Fisheries Limited Partnership, Lake Babine Nation Forestry Ltd., Lake Babine Nation Forestry Limited Partnership, Lake Babine Nation Construction Ltd., Lake Babine Nation Ventures Ltd., Lake Babine Nation Ventures LP, Nedut'een Development Corp., Fort Babine Lake Property Ltd., and 1203001 B.C. Ltd.
notes: Qualified audit opinion due to lack of audited financial information for 13 government business enterprises accounted for under modified equity method. Prior year comparative figures have been restated (Note 18) with a prior period adjustment of $3,786,077. The consolidated entity includes Lake Babine Nation Health Services Fund as a consolidated subsidiary. Income from Government Business Enterprises of $2,373,784 and bad debts - housing of $991,627 recorded as other items. Total revenue includes transfer to deferred revenue as a reduction. ISC funding identified as Federal Government line. Total government transfers calculated as Federal + Provincial = $16,155,247 + $9,874,264 = $26,029,511.
